review_title: Weave - Lots of tool on One Platform
description: It has been an excellent experience. Really enjoy working with weave and they are receptive to new features.
author: Duc T.
pros: Lots of tools built in. Reminders, reviews, payments, texting, and phones.
cons: Analytics is not available for Eaglesoft yet. It'd be nice to have an even more all in one solution.

description: I have used Weave for over a year now. I love all the features. Weave does almost everyting we need. We use it daily for texting, phone calls, and reminders.
author: Mere M.
pros: We used 3 other texting and phone systems and this one by far is the best. It is easy to use and setup. They are constantly adding new features that were recommended by users.
cons: The app version is not as good as the desktop or web version. Some things are unavailable. I am happy they just added the templates to the app though. Wish my signature would show up. If a client has multiple pets scheduled at the same time and they confirm their appointment, it only confirms 1.
author_profession: Vet Tech, Practice Manager and Receptionsit

review_title: Helpful Software, But Fell Short Over Time
description: Our experience with Weave started off strong. It provided a convenient all-in-one communication platform that helped streamline patient calls, texts, and appointment reminders. The system was user-friendly and integrated well with our practice, which made daily tasks more efficient in the beginning. However, over time, we encountered some challenges. The software didn’t evolve with our growing needs, and we found certain features lacking or less customizable compared to other platforms. Additionally, customer support response times were inconsistent, and the cost became harder to justify. In the end, while Weave served us well initially, we transitioned to a different platform that better fit our long-term needs for functionality, support, and value.
author: Amanda J.
pros: Weave was a helpful tool for our practice for a while, offering solid communication features like phone integration, texting, and appointment reminders. The initial setup was smooth, and the interface was user-friendly, which made onboarding relatively simple for the team.
cons: We ran into some limitations that impacted our daily operations. The pricing felt a bit high compared to what we were getting, especially as our practice grew and needed more robust features. We also experienced occasional technical glitches and delays in customer support response, which became frustrating during busy times.

description: Overall, I recommend Weave. It is a great communication tool and has many features like scheduling and appointment management.
author: Karen T.
pros: The communication and recordings logs. When speaking to clients on the phone, you can go back and play the recording after in case needed.
cons: I've never had any issues with Weave. We use it daily and have never encountered any problems, so I guess that is a good thing.

description: Very pleased and actually are upgrading our plan with them
author: Cheyenne P.
pros: the interactions with the patient are much easier to track
cons: the short character limit for bulk messaging

description: Avoid and look for alternatives, they also downplay their competitors like Adit and RevenueWell instead of actually learning from them and making their product better. For the price you pay, I'd look else where.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The login and system UI is quite fast, it has a good minimal UI and more detailed one
cons: With Weave, it's just a nightmare with the customer service and support. And guess what, any settings or setup you want to change, you only have to go through their customer support because whenever you make changes from their web portal, none of it gets actually reflected.

review_title: Not a mobile business option - although they will say it is
description: I was assured that this will work for my mobile business. I laid out to the sales team in detail as to how I run my mobile business communication. I was made aware of certain minor limitations but decided to give it a try anyway. The limitations were that I could not use my vehicle controls to make and answer calls - I could work around that. What I actually experienced was the system was glitchy when in motion and actually froze up the phone where I had to frequently restart the phone for it to start working again. Navigating through the menu items - voicemail, calls, messaging is cumbersome and not recommended while driving. You WILL need a mobile wifi service in order to use this service in order to not have calls dropped or delays in your conversations - although this still happened.
author: Henry B.
pros: Office/Desktop functionality is great. Integrated into my practice management system.
cons: Not mobile business friendly service - although they say it works fine in your vehicle. This is also one the most expensive VOIP services you will find out there.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: A powerful tool for healthcare communication that enhances patient interaction, though it could benefit from better reliability and more competitive pricing.
author: Sanaa K.
pros: The all-in-one communication system makes patient calls, texts, and reminders seamless, improving workflow and efficiency.
cons: Occasional glitches and connectivity issues can disrupt operations, and the pricing feels a bit high for smaller practices.

description: Absolutely terrible. It's actually insane how awful our experience has been in less than a few weeks. Buyer beware. The only upside is no contracts. We will be cancelling our service.
author: Terra T.
pros: As far as the actual software goes, the only thing I liked was what was shown and promised to us during our demo before purchasing the product, which was not at all what the product or support actually delivered. The cost is much lower than competitors, which initially seemed like a great deal, but now it's clear that you get what you pay for.
cons: Everything, but especially the support. Our entire experience porting over from our previous software (Podium) was a nightmare, and our "dedicated team" was unavailable during the process. We told them we were only able port our phone number over on a Monday, as it's the only weekday we're closed. They decided to initiate the port on a Tuesday during business hours, without asking us first, leaving us with no phone lines for hours and no way for our patients to reach us. When we attempted to contact them to find out what was going on (because we didn't know they were porting our number that day), we were told no port was happening, only to be contacted hours later after the port was completed by the very person we'd been trying to get ahold of all day, stating that the port was complete. The product functionality is also terrible. "Features" that are half built and not meant to be used yet, despite them being launched in the software. Many functionalities that are promised are actually not available at all. Oh but don't worry, everything you need is "on the road map to be implemented next year".
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Alexander G.
pros: The thing that really stood out to me about Weave was the texting feature that made it easy for communication to happen.
cons: Nothing really made me dislike Weave. It didn’t really fit price wise for the clinic though and that’s honest.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: We love how it integrates with our eaglesoft software so when someone calls I already know all their information before I even pick up the call. This has made my job alot easier and saves time.
author: Cherie A.
pros: Very easy to use and alot of things I can get done with just one application.
cons: It freezes up multiple times a day and closes itself out. Sometimes has difficulty connecting to our credit card machine.

description: We have been overall very happy the Weave and recommend to other dental offices.
author: Mercedes G.
pros: Phone system and texting capability is great
cons: The new updated format is taking time to learn

description: Fantastic, we have tried other platforms and always come back to Weave!
author: Danielle M.
pros: We love how it is all in one app! Customer service is outstanding and we can always get questions answered quickly!
cons: The online scheduling app does not work with our office.

description: Easy to use. User friendly. Any type of communication, weave has you covered.
author: Kristine F.
pros: Combines phone, text, and email communication in a single interface. Clients can confirm appointments directly through messages, minimizing administrative workload. Caller ID is very helpful.
cons: I don't have any dislikes. I really love Weave!

author: Danny M.
pros: Weave is a great communication solution for our practice. The interface for texting our customers is easy and sleek. Automated text reminders for appointments are very customizable. We highly recommend Weave!
cons: The desktop app had some bugs but they were responsive and those issues were resolved with the new web-based interface.

description: Overall, I like Weave. Unfortunately, we have never gotten our call tree to properly work and there isn't a function to automatically place incoming calls on hold.
author: Melissa B.
pros: Texting and ability to send photos via text to owners- this makes it very easy to update owners. Owners can also request appointments through the app.
cons: I wish it integrated with our PIMS software. It would be very helpful to be able to easily see all client communications from the patient chart.

description: I have been using Weave for over three years now and it truly helps our office with every aspect of communication - chatting with team members within the office, being able to text patients, and sending digital forms. Our office is super thankful to have Weave.
author: Abby L.
pros: Weave makes communicating with our patients a breeze! I love the team chat feature to communicate with our team members in our office.
cons: No complaints with Weave. 10/10 recommend.

description: Great. Made recalls and communication with patients a breeze
author: Ruth E.
pros: The ease of reaching out to patients and the ability to read my voicemails
cons: Nothing at all. My only issue was cost. If pricing could be more affordable

review_title: Weave is the way to go!
description: We have 4 offices and use it in all. We chat with employees and like that part with groups also great.
author: Maribel P.
pros: its easy to use , patients can send pictures of insurance card
cons: the updates constant , when I have to update and im in middle of a text

description: Overall, I enjoy using weave. I am a study coordinator and weave has been really helpful for subject recruitment and checking in with participants during trials.
author: Leah L.
pros: Automatic appointment reminders and the ability to create templates.
cons: I have had issues with sending PDFs to patients.

description: 9.5/10. From day one has been very easy to integrate.
author: Tom H.
pros: Very comprehensive. Amazing phone/text system. Our office has about 50% of communication through text that is done through Weave. Very time efficient for team and patients.
cons: Support can take a bit of time. But really never need it.

review_title: Weave is helpful for our Med Spa
description: Very positive experience with Weave. Customer service is knowledgeable and helpful also.
author: Tina A.
pros: I love how Weave has all that we need in one place; from texts to documents needing to be signed and taking payments. It has definitely streamlined our business.
cons: Once in a while it will move slowly, but not concerning at all.

review_title: Amazing connecting with patients with ease
description: its great, easy to use helps with forms and payments as well .
author: Jen Anne T.
pros: I like the fact that it sends appointment reminders for patients to confirm. I also like the ability to send bulk texts. we use these for our monthly promos.
cons: slow to merge with a new contact in nextech

review_title: Great company and easy to work with
description: One of the best decisions I've made as a practice owner
author: Thomas R.
pros: Easy transition to their equipment and the app is great. My patients love getting the reminders!
cons: The bulk text messaging was disappointing because of the small size of the message allowed

description: We have been using for our present clinic management software and that we are switching to a new software we'll integrate it to the new one as well
author: Gabby B.
pros: Easy app for internal and external communication
cons: Setting the platform up for a new system is somewhat lengthy
